'''Fil'vye Transport''' was a shipping and transport company owned by [[Oneron Fil'vye]]. The company was headquartered on [[Streysel Island]] on [[Vaynai/Legends|Vaynai]]. The company was a front for smuggling operations.

{{Company-stub}}
